'''鈭歨-s-ng-f''' ('''kahasngefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:technocratize|technocratize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-s-ng-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:technocratize|technocratize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歨-s-ng-f
|-
! Lemma
| kahasngefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihasngefoko|thihasngefoko]] || [[word:jihasngefoko|jihasngefoko]] || [[word:shihasngefoko|shihasngefoko]] || [[word:kihasngefoko|kihasngefoko]]
|-
